Flow.description: Portal Screen Flow for inputting spend against the various property energy category associated with the batch
Flow.interviewLabel: ABS FORM - Property Energy Category Spend Comnbined {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: ABS FORM - Property Energy Category Spend Combined

fields.name: ScreenTitle
fields.fieldText: Spend Per Home - {!varTenureTypeTitle}

fields.name: BatchId
fields.fieldText:
{!Batch.LA_Identifier__c}

Version {!Batch.Version_Number__c}

fields.name: Total_Home_Costs
fields.fieldText: Total Home Costs (will update on next screen)

fields.name: Total_Measure_Costs
fields.fieldText: Total Measure Costs

fields.name: Total_Capital_Expenditure_Costs
fields.fieldText: Total Capital Expenditure Costs

fields.name: HomeTotalDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Home count of tenure {!varTenureTypeTitle}:

{!tenureHomeCount}

fields.name: Header
fields.fieldText: Please input the cost details for these homes (please use 0 if appropriate)

fields.name: EP_House_Count
fields.fieldText: What is the number of {!varTenureTypeTitle} homes activating their energy performance pot of funding within this batch i.e. receiving energy performance measures? (* Required)

fields.name: epHouseCountError
fields.fieldText: ERROR: The number of homes utilising the energy performance pot for {!varTenureTypeTitle} must be less than or equal to {!tenureHomeCount}

fields.name: EP_Matched_Total
fields.fieldText: What is the total landlord matched funding for energy performance pot for {!varTenureTypeTitle} homes within batch? (* Required)

fields.name: EPMatchedFundingErrorTitle
fields.fieldText: ERROR: {!varTenureTypeTitle} Matched Landlord Funding is inadequate for this batch for the energy performance pot

fields.name: EP_Total_Grant
fields.fieldText: What is the total grant funding for the energy performance pot for these {!varTenureTypeTitle} homes? (* Required)

fields.name: EP_Averages
fields.fieldText:
﻿Energy Performance Cost Cap (averaged across project): {!varEPSchemeCap}


Average grant spend of energy performance pot for {!varTenureTypeTitle} homes within batch

fields.name: EP_AverageperBatch
fields.fieldText:
{!flaEP_Spend_Per_house}

{!flaDisplayEPBatchWarning}﻿

fields.name: EP_Averages_Baseline
fields.fieldText: Average grant spend of energy performance pot for all approved {!varTenureTypeTitle} homes to date + homes in current batch

fields.name: EP_AverageperAward
fields.fieldText:
{!flaEP_Spend_Per_House_All_Approved}

{!flaDisplayEPOverallWarning}

fields.name: LCH_House_Count
fields.fieldText: What is the number of {!varTenureTypeTitle} homes activating their low carbon heat pot of funding within this batch i.e. receiving low carbon heat measures? (* Required)

fields.name: lchHouseCountError
fields.fieldText: ERROR: The number of homes utilising the low carbon heat pot for {!varTenureTypeTitle} must be less than or equal to {!tenureHomeCount}

fields.name: LCH_Matched_Total
fields.fieldText: What is the total landlord matched funding for low carbon heat pot for {!varTenureTypeTitle} homes within batch? (* Required)

fields.name: LCHMatchedFunderErrorTitle
fields.fieldText: ERROR: {!varTenureTypeTitle} Matched Landlord Funding is inadequate for this batch for the low carbon heat pot

fields.name: LCH_Total_Grant
fields.fieldText: What is the total grant funding for the low carbon heat pot for these {!varTenureTypeTitle}? (* Required)

fields.name: LCH_Averages
fields.fieldText:
Low Carbon Heat Cost Cap (averaged across project): {!varLCHSchemeCap}


Average grant spend of low carbon heat pot for {!varTenureTypeTitle} homes within batch

fields.name: LCH_AverageperBatch
fields.fieldText:
{!flaLCH_Spend_Per_House}

{!flaDisplayLCHBatchWarning}

fields.name: LCH_Averages_Baseline
fields.fieldText: Average grant spend of low carbon heat for all approved {!varTenureTypeTitle} homes to date + homes in current batch

fields.name: LCH_AverageperAward
fields.fieldText:
{!flaLCH_Spend_Per_House_All_Approved}

{!flaDisplayLCHOverallWarning}﻿

textTemplates.name: txtBatchAverageWarning
textTemplates.text: WARNING: The average price for this tenure type within this batch exceeds the cost cap which must be met on average across the project by project closure﻿

textTemplates.name: txtMatchExceptionWarning
textTemplates.text: WARNING: This tenure type requires funding by the landlord that matches or exceeds the grant

textTemplates.name: txtOverallAverageWarning
textTemplates.text: WARNING: The cumulative average price for this tenure type to date exceeds the limit which must be met by project closure
